# Draft an off-market outreach letter

## Candidate
- Address: 123 ELM ST, PITTSBURGH, PA, 15217
- Mailing: 999 BEACH RD, MIAMI, FL, 33101 (out-of-state — absentee)
- Propensity tier: high_priority (score 50)
- Signal reasons:
  - sheriff_sale:2026-08-01
  - absentee:FL
  - long_tenure_high_equity:25

## User note about this property
Blue craftsman with the porch swing on the corner of Elm and 5th.

## Voice profile (excerpt)
## Tone
Warm, specific. Not salesy.
## Sentence cadence
Short declaratives. Avg ~12 words.

## Tone constraints (from references/letter-craft.md)
- Warm, specific to this property/street.
- NO investor jargon: avoid "we buy houses", "cash offer", "investment opportunity", "no realtors".
- Generic salutation — WPRDC owner_name is a code, not a real name. Use "To the homeowner at <address>" or similar.
- Sign with placeholders: <Your Name> / <your-email>. The user replaces these at print time.
- Length: 100-200 words. One page of handwritten-friendly text.
- Mention a real detail about the property or street (the user can edit in specifics; the LLM should leave a `[<specific detail>]` placeholder where unknown).

## Now draft the letter.
